allow: Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/main\\.py - CERBERUS brain/main.py - Triple D brain/' -e 's/class Cerberus:/class TripleD:/' -e 's/\\[cerberus\\]/[triple-d]/g' -e 's/Cerberus\(\)\\.run\(\)/TripleD\(\).run\(\)/' triple-d/uno_q/main.py)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/CERBERUS - Uno Q \(Linux\)/Triple D - Uno Q \(Linux\)/' triple-d/uno_q/requirements.txt)
